title: Mars's Fallout Expansion
description: This project adds mobs, blocks, items, and mechanics seen in and inspired by the Fallout Universe.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99f0139f93d2698d906ce25b22356ad88f366e69.png)

_War… war never changes… but your Minecraft world is about to._

Mars’s Fallout Expansion brings the dangerous, apocalyptic feel of the wasteland into Minecraft with new creatures, game mechanics, weapons, structures, blocks, and loot directly from and inspired by the Fallout universe.

This is my first mod, and the goal is simple: make Minecraft feel more hostile, more rewarding, and a lot more post-apocalyptic.

# **REQUIRES**

## **GeckoLib**

# What This Mod Adds

## Wasteland Creatures

![Mirelurks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f7a9f840fb726b3a11d9de8aa531bdbfc229742.png)

Face off against familiar Fallout-inspired enemies, including:

- Bloatflies
- Feral Ghouls
- Eyebots
- Radroaches
- Mole Rats
- Mirelurks
- Protectrons
- And more to come
  
## Radiation System

![rad system](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b97f20d129a29a6452508d0552de240d0103c073.png)

The wasteland is dangerous even when nothing is attacking you.

Radiation can build up from contaminated areas, irradiated food, Uranium Ore deposits, and other hazards. Manage your exposure, use protective gear, and keep yourself alive before the rads cook you from the inside out.

## Thirst System

![thirst system](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cb989e422f6eef496e016352fc8033a7f6b9881.png)

Survival is no longer just about hunger.

You’ll need to watch your thirst, collect water, purify it, and think more carefully about what you eat and drink while exploring.

## Weapons, Armor, Blocks, and Items

![lockpicking minigame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf8d945f954afbefb94df4a5356207d00903642c.png)

Build, fight, and survive with new content inspired by the Fallout universe, including:

- Wasteland weapons
- Fallout-style foods and drinks
- Decorative and functional apocalypse-themed blocks
- Armor and survival items
- Lootable containers
- Lockpicking Minigame
- And more

## New Structures

![abandoned structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b3b7c539a35a247a91514e33d9557627135917a.png)

Find new Fallout-inspired structures to discover such as:

- Destroyed buildings
- Nuclear waste disposal sites
- Scrap shacks
- Mirelurk nests
- Abandoned vehicles
- RobCo Sales and Service Center
- And more planned for future updates

## Future Plans

- More content is already planned, including:
- 
- Mr. Gutsy
- Mr. Handy / Ms. Nanny
- Vaults
- Deathclaws
- Fat Man / Mini Nukes
- TACZ integration
- More mobs, structures, weapons, blocks, and features

## Final Note

This mod is still growing, and since it’s my first mod, feedback is welcome. Expect more updates soon!

Welcome to the wasteland. Hope you have some radaway.
